title: OpenAppointments
author: Open Out
description: Appointment scheduler, a Rails port of Easy!Appointments.

sync.command: bash -c 'set -a; source /app/data/env; set +a; cd /app/code && HOME=/tmp bin/rails openappointments:sync'

cleanup.command: bash -c 'set -a; source /app/data/env; set +a; cd /app/code && HOME=/tmp bin/rails openappointments:cleanup'

postInstallMessage: Run 'cloudron exec' and 'bin/rails openappointments:install' output is in the app logs: the initial admin username is 'administrator' and the generated password is printed on first start.
